sections.abandonment_condition: After two rounds of calibration the combined model fails to beat baseline MAPE by >= 5 percentage points or fails to meet the useful-improvement threshold (MAPE <= 25%; >= 75% within 30%; >= 75% bottleneck accuracy) on real B200 measurements.
citations: arXiv 2603.05451v1 — FlashAttention-4: Algorithm and Kernel Pipelining Co-Design for Asymmetric Hardware Scaling.
arXiv 2605.04178v1 — white-box GPU performance modeling methodology.
arXiv 2512.02189v1 — Blackwell microbenchmarks (SMEM 128 B/clock/SM, MUFU 16 ops/clock/SM).
sections.comparator_relation: The selected route is a direct child of the accepted baseline (artifact-ACCEPTED_BASELINE_RECORD-e673ec2be9b4) and a real-hardware refinement of artifact-SELECTED_HYPOTHESIS-bab659036a3c. It preserves the white-box structure and replaces the emulator ground truth with real B200 FlashAttention-4 kernel launches.
sections.expected_effect: Held-out MAPE on real B200 measurements drops from the baseline value to <= 25%; >= 75% of validation configs are within 30% absolute error; >= 75% bottleneck labels match the dominant measured regime.

experiment_ready_brief.expected_outcome: Combined analytical predictor beats the FA4 paper roofline baseline by >= 5 percentage points MAPE and meets the useful-improvement threshold on real B200 FlashAttention-4 forward-pass measurements.
failure_criteria: Combined model does not beat baseline MAPE by >= 5 percentage points after two calibration rounds on real measurements.
Combined model fails the useful-improvement threshold on real measurements.
Real B200 kernel execution is infeasible or fp8/fp4 precision is unsupported and reduced coverage prevents a fair test.
inputs: Real B200 calibration split (~20% of configuration matrix) with measured FlashAttention-4 forward-pass runtime via flash_attn_func from flash_attn.cute on cuda:0.
Real B200 held-out validation split (~20%) with measured runtime from the same kernel launches.
Accepted baseline predictor code and constants.
FA4 source tile sizes and launch parameters from repos/extern/flash-attention @ 002cce0.
success_criteria: delta MAPE vs baseline >= 5 percentage points improvement

sections.falsification: If the combined predictor, after calibration on the real B200 calibration split, does not beat the baseline MAPE by >= 5 percentage points on the held-out real B200 validation set, the hypothesis is falsified.
sections.hypothesis: The existing white-box predictor (fa4-b200-whitebox-occupancy-tma-l2-precision-v1) achieves the useful-improvement threshold when validated against real B200 FlashAttention-4 forward-pass measurements.
sections.mechanism: The FA4 roofline bounds runtime by max(MMA FLOPs/peak, SMEM bytes/peak, exponential ops/peak). On B200 the actual runtime is larger because peak throughput is only reachable at sufficient occupancy and because HBM/L2/TMA transfers are not perfectly efficient. The existing predictor adds a multiplicative occupancy factor to each throughput term and replaces peak HBM bandwidth with an effective bandwidth curve calibrated on transfer size; precision is handled via per-precision Tensor Core and MUFU rates. The real-hardware test checks whether these physically motivated corrections generalize from the emulator to actual B200 kernel launches.
sections.minimal_test: Run flash_attn_func from flash_attn.cute on cuda:0 for the design matrix; measure median runtime; calibrate predictor.py constants on the calibration split only; evaluate MAPE, max APE, 30%-error coverage, and bottleneck-label accuracy on held-out validation; compare to baseline predictor.
sections.pitch: Validate the existing combined occupancy/TMA-L2/precision analytical predictor against real B200 FlashAttention-4 kernel measurements and confirm it meets the useful-improvement threshold.
sections.risk: Real B200 scheduling, launch overhead, or precision-format support may differ from the emulator. If fp8/fp4 are unsupported, coverage is reduced to bf16/fp16. If the dominant error source is implementation-specific scheduling, the white-box additions may not move MAPE materially.
transfer_gaps_to_watch: Precision format support (fp8/fp4) in the installed FA4 build.
Launch overhead and CPU/Python dispatch latency for tiny configs.
OOM behavior on large batch x seqlen combinations.

summary: Real-hardware refinement of the selected hypothesis for the FlashAttention-4 B200 white-box runtime model.
title: Selected Hypothesis: Real-Hardware Validation of the FA4 B200 White-Box Predictor
